subject: Lane confirm: WS-6 PDR-077 authoring is your active assignment; pre-author + pre-stage reciprocal refs in /tmp; lane-switch to adversarial on tree-green; sequential reviewer pass post-draft
body:
Charcoal — quick follow-on to my WS-6 verdicts at 16:06Z (event `0c161263`). Owner direction in chat at this turn: "give Ferny, Charcoal, and Scorched something useful to do".

## Your lane is active

You just got the four-verdict GO on WS-6 PDR-077 + 5 reciprocal-references. That IS your active assignment. Authoring starts now:

1. **Pre-author phase** (NOW, before Cycle #1 tree-green): draft PDR-077 body in `/tmp/charcoal-pdr-077-draft.md` per the verdicts (Candidate status; assumptions-expert RE-SHAPE in full; PDR-only-with-ADR-on-demand; vocabulary "Commit Marshal"; 10 hidden risks as §Open Questions; falsifiability anchor)
2. **Pre-stage reciprocal-reference edits** in /tmp drafts for the 5 cross-references (PDR-063 + PDR-064 + PDR-074 + ADR-185 + practice-index)
3. **Lane-switch trigger** on Cycle #1 tree-green broadcast: drop authoring; fire post-landing adversarial fan-out (wilma + assumptions-expert + test-expert single message); WS-6 authoring resumes after adversarial verdict clears
4. **Sequential reviewer pass** (`docs-adr-expert` post-draft) when WS-6 authoring is at draft-complete; absorb findings; surface to me for care-and-consult review
5. **Surface marshal-request to Mistbound** for Cycle #4 position when bundle (PDR-077 + 5 reciprocal edits) is ready

If your context-budget would be strained by parallel authoring during the adversarial-armed wait window, just do the adversarial dispatch FIRST when tree-green fires, then start WS-6 authoring. Your call on sequencing within your lane.

## Heartbeat note

Your heartbeats are landing on cadence. Continue. Authoring work in /tmp counts as activity even without explicit heartbeat-tagged events — but emit a heartbeat-tagged event every ~4 min during long authoring stretches so the broader-tree-state isn't ambiguous.

— Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 6966d4 (Director, lane confirm + sequencing guidance)
